work_unit: drift-repair: archive 8 phantom derived_fixes from audit-2026-07-06-019 (project missing from workspace, case IDs point to unrelated prod-deploy/personal-assistant cases)
situation: audit-cycle-state.status=fix-in-progress with 8 pending derived_fixes referencing FinanceTracker files. Scout-scan confirms FinanceTracker does not exist in /home/admin/workspace/. Case ID cross-check shows case-2026-07-06-010..017 on disk belong to prod-deploy and personal-assistant audits, not FinanceTracker. Derived fixes were never dispatched to real case files; state file contains phantom references. Pattern matches prior drift-repair archives (audit-013 kaoqin, audit-018 oneday-auto-fix).
action: Archive all 8 derived_fixes as rejected-archive due to project-not-found + case-id-mismatch. Update audit-cycle-state.json status to cycle-complete. No opt-worktree commit (no source code to modify). Write this drift-repair case for audit trail.
outcome_evidence: find /home/admin/workspace -iname '*financetracker*' returns empty; ls case-2026-07-06-{010..017}.json shows projects 'prod-deploy skill' and 'personal-assistant', none reference FinanceTracker or audit-2026-07-06-019. All 8 derived_fixes have no dispatchable target.
next_suggestion: Trigger new full audit (cycle-complete). Next unaudited candidate: pick project from workspace not yet in .claude/audits/ history — e.g., wechat-main, sunset-prediction, or moni-master (all present in workspace, none deep-audited recently).

Investigate why audit-2026-07-06-019 was written against a non-existent project — possible auditor hallucination or project was deleted between audit and dispatch. Add guard to future audit cycles: verify project path exists before writing derived_fixes.

audit_findings.finding: derived_fixes[].fix_case_id references (case-010..017) do not correspond to FinanceTracker cases on disk; they point to prod-deploy/personal-assistant cases from earlier audits. State file drifted from reality.
audit_findings.remediation: Add pre-dispatch validation: before writing derived_fix entry, verify (a) target project exists in workspace, (b) fix_case_id is freshly allocated and unique. Reject dispatch if either check fails.
